想問如果佢話6個月合約，如果我中途唔做，係唔係要賠錢比佢？
希望多D我想做嘅工請人啦

My friend has an interview for a marketing director position in a company tomorrow. The company laid particular stress on the importance of leadership qualities. They also stressed that clear communication skill is a crucial factor in the outcome of the interview. The interview stresses him out. I said "Dont stress too much over it. Just put your mind at ease." My girlfriend too said "Rest easy. Dont stress about it. Set your mind at rest." My brother also said "Don't stress yourself too much. you'll be ok." He quit his previous job because his colleagues always bullied him and the salary was low. I said "I don't blame you for wanting to leave." Another friend of mine works at Hilton. He said he deserved a promotion but instead his colleague was given the promotion because his boss is biased in favour of his colleague. I said that's the way the cookie crumbles. Its water under the bridge. What it's done is done. My brother too said it's no use crying over spilt milk. What's done cannot be undone. Apparently his manager is also biased against him but towards his colleague. oh well. Let bygones be bygones.
